positiveEvidence: CTO is unambiguously a decision-maker title for a technical purchase
Email and LinkedIn both available — fully reachable
Industry (analytics consulting) is plausibly adjacent to data governance — could have client-driven need
counterEvidence: 4-employee company is well below typical enterprise data governance buyer profile (usually 200+ employees)
$80k starting price is likely 50-100% of this company's annual software budget
No recent activity means no observable buying trigger — purely cold outreach
CTO at a 4-person company is also the implementer — buy/build calculus tilts toward build or open-source
Analytics consultancies typically resell or recommend to clients rather than buy enterprise tools themselves
